title: What Scripture Actually Means When It Says Let Your Yes Be Yes
caption:
Your word was supposed to be enough on its own.

Matthew 5:37 isn't really about oaths at an altar. It's about the Tuesday no one's watching, the promise that gets inconvenient three weeks later, the version of you in the group chat versus the version at church.

A godly man doesn't need a contract to keep his word, and he doesn't need two versions of himself depending on the room.

#faith #integrity #christianman #character #godlyman
